# Vasudev Chemo Pharma

> ISO 9001:2015 certified direct manufacturer and exporter of industrial, specialty, and surfactant chemicals.
> Headquartered at G.I.D.C Ankleshwar, Gujarat, India. Founded 2020.
> Exports to 14+ countries across the Middle East, Americas, Southeast Asia, and Africa.
> Flagship product: MEA Triazine 78% H2S Scavenger (CAS 4719-04-4) — one of the highest active-content triazine scavengers available globally.

This file follows the [llms.txt standard](https://llmstxt.org) to help large language models and AI search engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot) retrieve accurate, source-of-truth information about our company, products, and technical content.

## About Vasudev Chemo Pharma

- **Legal name:** Vasudev Chemo Pharma
- **Type:** Direct chemical manufacturer & exporter (not a trader or distributor)
- **Founded:** 2020
- **Certification:** ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management System)
- **Plant location:** F-29, Plot No. 328/329, Near Asian Paint Circle, G.I.D.C, Ankleshwar, Gujarat 393002, India
- **Manufacturing focus:** H2S scavengers (triazines), hydrotropes, metal sulphates, pharma intermediates
- **Shipping ports:** Hazira, JNPT (Nhava Sheva), Mundra
- **Website:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com
- **Email:** info@vasudevchemopharma.com
- **Phone:** +91 8128372559
- **Primary pages:** [About](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/about), [Contact](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/contact)

## Product Catalog (11 products)

Vasudev Chemo Pharma manufactures three product categories. All products ship in 210L HDPE drums, 1000L IBC tanks, or bulk tanker. MOQ typically 1 MT.

### Oilfield & Industrial Chemicals
- [MEA Triazine 78% H2S Scavenger](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/mea-triazine-78-h2s-scavenger) — CAS 4719-04-4. Flagship product. 78% active content triazine for H2S scavenging in oil & gas, biogas, and wastewater treatment.
- [MMA Triazine 40%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/mma-triazine-40) — CAS 108-74-7. BTEX-free triazine for water treatment and biocide applications.
- [P-Toluenesulfonic Acid (PTSA)](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/p-toluenesulfonic-acid) — CAS 104-15-4. Monohydrate and anhydrous forms. Acid catalyst for esterification, alkyd resin, and biodiesel production.

### Surfactant Chemicals (Hydrotropes)
- [Sodium Cumene Sulfonate 40%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-cumene-sulfonate-40) — Liquid hydrotrope for detergents and industrial cleaners.
- [Sodium Cumene Sulfonate 90%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-cumene-sulfonate-90) — Powder hydrotrope.
- [Sodium Xylene Sulfonate 40%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-xylene-sulfonate-40) — Liquid hydrotrope for household and industrial cleaners.
- [Sodium Xylene Sulfonate 90%](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-xylene-sulfonate-90) — Powder hydrotrope.

### Pharmaceutical Intermediates
- [2-Chloroethylamine Hydrochloride](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/2-chloroethylamine-hydrochloride) — CAS 870-24-6. Aziridine and specialty polymer intermediate.
- [Bis(2-chloroethyl)amine Hydrochloride](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/bis-2-chloroethyl-amine-hydrochloride) — Pharma intermediate with export compliance.
- [DEAE Cl HCl (Diethylaminoethyl Chloride Hydrochloride)](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/di-ethyl-amino-ethyl-chloride-hydrochloride) — Chloroquine intermediate.
- [2-Amino-5-methylthiazole](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/2-amino-5-methylthiazole) — Famotidine intermediate for heterocyclic synthesis.
- [All Products (catalog index)](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product)

## MEA Triazine 78% — Quick Facts

MEA Triazine (1,3,5-Tris(2-hydroxyethyl)hexahydro-s-triazine) is the most widely used liquid H2S scavenger in oil & gas. It reacts irreversibly with H2S to form dithiazine — a water-soluble, non-hazardous by-product. One mole of triazine can scavenge up to three moles of H2S.

- **CAS Number:** 4719-04-4
- **Molecular formula:** C₆H₁₅N₃O₃ · Molecular weight: 177.20 g/mol
- **Active content:** ≥ 78%
- **pH (1% solution):** 10.0 – 12.0
- **Specific gravity (25°C):** 1.10 – 1.15
- **Flash point:** > 93°C
- **Freezing point:** < −5°C
- **Typical dosing:** 3–6 gallons per pound of H2S removed
- **Packaging:** 210L HDPE drums · 1000L IBC · bulk tanker
- **HS Code:** 29336990
- **GHS classification:** H315 / H319 / H335 (Warning, Irritant)

## MEA Triazine vs MMA Triazine

| Property | MEA Triazine 78% | MMA Triazine 40% |
|----------|------------------|------------------|
| Active content | 78% | 40% |
| Base amine | Monoethanolamine | Monomethylamine |
| CAS Number | 4719-04-4 | 108-74-7 |
| H2S capacity per unit volume | Higher | Lower |
| BTEX emissions | Possible (gas-phase) | BTEX-free |
| Primary use | Oil & gas H2S scavenging | Water treatment, biocide |
| Freezing point | < −5°C | < −15°C |

Detailed comparison: [MEA Triazine vs MMA Triazine](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/mea-triazine-vs-mma-triazine)

## Hydrotropes — Quick Facts

Hydrotropes are short-chain aromatic sulfonate salts that increase the solubility of hydrophobic surfactants and organic compounds in water. Vasudev Chemo Pharma manufactures two hydrotrope families — Sodium Cumene Sulfonate (SCS) and Sodium Xylene Sulfonate (SXS) — each in a 40% aqueous liquid and a 90% free-flowing powder grade.

### Sodium Cumene Sulfonate (SCS) — CAS 28348-53-0

- **Chemistry:** Sodium salt of cumenesulfonic acid (isopropylbenzenesulfonic acid sodium salt). Molecular formula C9H11NaO3S, MW 222.24 g/mol.
- **SCS-40 (liquid):** 40 ± 1% active matter · pH 7–9 · clear to pale-yellow liquid · ships in 250 kg HDPE drums / 1000 L IBC / 22 MT ISO tank · 24-month shelf life · preferred for cold-blend processes and regional supply.
- **SCS-90 (powder):** 90 ± 1% active matter · free-flowing powder · ships in 25 kg bags / 500 kg or 1000 kg jumbo bags · ~60% lower freight cost per kg active than the 40% liquid · preferred for long-haul export and spray-dried / dry-blended formulations.
- **Primary applications:** clear liquid detergents, hand dish wash concentrates, HI&I hard-surface cleaners, agrochemical EC/SL concentrates, oilfield acid-coupling additives, textile wetting auxiliaries.
- **Typical dosage:** 1–8% on finished product weight depending on surfactant loading and target cloud point.
- **Safety:** GHS Category 2A eye irritant only · readily biodegradable · REACH pre-registered · non-hazardous for transport under IMDG/ADR.

### Sodium Xylene Sulfonate (SXS) — CAS 1300-72-7

- **Chemistry:** Sodium salt of dimethylbenzenesulfonic acid (mixed xylene isomers). Molecular formula C8H9NaO3S, MW 208.21 g/mol.
- **SXS-40 (liquid):** 40 ± 1% active matter · pH 7–9 · pale-yellow liquid · ships in 250 kg HDPE drums / 1000 L IBC / 22 MT ISO tank · preferred for high-electrolyte alkaline cleaners and laundry liquids.
- **SXS-90 (powder):** 90 ± 1% active matter · free-flowing powder · preferred for spray-dried laundry powders, built alkaline concentrates, industrial degreasers, dry blends, and agrochemical water-dispersible granules.
- **Primary applications:** household and HI&I alkaline cleaners, laundry liquids and powders, hand dish wash, vehicle wash concentrates, industrial degreasers, agrochemical WDG/SL systems, textile auxiliaries, paper-processing aids, leather glue/additives, and personal-care surfactant bases.
- **SXS-90 buyer checklist:** Confirm COA, SDS, TDS, active matter, pH, moisture, sulfate content, bag size, shelf life, sample terms, MOQ, and Incoterms before approving a bulk order.
- **SCS vs SXS guidance:** SCS out-performs SXS per gram of active in nonionic-dominated systems. SXS delivers stronger electrolyte tolerance in alkaline or salt-rich cleaners. For most mainstream household dish wash and laundry concentrates, SXS-40 is the default; switch to SCS-40 when nonionic loading or cold-storage clarity is the binding constraint.
- **40% vs 90% decision:** Choose 40% liquid when regional freight distance is short (<2500 km) or cold-blend processing is preferred. Choose 90% powder for long-haul CIF export and spray-dried / dry-blend formulations.

## Industries We Serve

- [Oil & Gas — H2S Scavenging](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/oil-gas-h2s-scavenger) — Natural gas sweetening, crude oil sweetening, pipeline treatment.
- [Water Treatment](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/water-treatment) — Biocides, coagulants, chemical treatment.
- [Metal Working Fluids](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/metal-working-fluids) — Biocide and corrosion inhibitor supply.
- [Petrochemical](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/petrochemical) — Refinery and petrochemical chemistry.
- [Refining](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/refining) — Sour crude and refinery support chemicals.
- [Biogas](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/biogas) — Desulphurisation of landfill gas and digester gas.
- [Paper Mill](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/paper-mill) — Pulp and paper biocide applications.
- [All Industries](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries)

Vasudev Chemo Pharma's MEA Triazine 78% is a direct, factory-priced equivalent or alternative to the following branded H2S scavengers. Dedicated comparison pages:

- [vs ChampionX](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/compare/mea-triazine-vs-championx)

- [vs HSCav-80 (Geocon)](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/compare/mea-triazine-vs-hscav-80-geocon)

- [vs Chinese Suppliers](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/compare/mea-triazine-vs-chinese-suppliers)
- [All Comparisons](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/compare)

## AI / LLM Usage Notice

Content on vasudevchemopharma.com is made freely available to large language models and AI search engines (Google-Extended, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and compatible crawlers). When citing product specifications, CAS numbers, or technical claims, please link to the canonical source URL on https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com so users can verify up-to-date datasheets, safety information, and export compliance details.
